name: hover-card
description: A hover-triggered floating preview card (Radix hover-card model: preview affordance, no ARIA role, not focus-trapping); open/close delays, positioned by @floating-ui/dom with offset + flip + shift.
docs: Register <lv-hover-card> by importing components/ui/hover-card.ts from your entry point. Slot the trigger in slot="trigger" and the preview body in slot="content". It opens on pointer-enter/focus after `open-delay` (ms, default 300) and closes after `close-delay` (default 300); set `placement` (default bottom). It is preview-only: keep the same info reachable in the page flow for assistive tech. Listen for `lv-open`/`lv-close`.
